calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Feb-20-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:49am and concluding at 10:08am.

Plaintiff Lakeview Loan Servicing, LLC appearing represented by Charles Correia, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Richard Byron Jercha not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff and Custodian of Records Simon Ward Brown and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Lakeview Loan Servicing LLC, and against Defendant Richard Byron Jercha, as follows:

1. There shall be a Reformed Deed of Trust re: Property located at 340 Munich Street San Francisco, CA 9412

Proposed judgment for declaratory relief signed and filed this date.
